hero.description: We transform traditional Autism Treatment into an engaging and effective experience through immersive VR games, personalized learning programs, and AI-powered adaptive scenarios.

features.title: Why Choose
features.description: Innovative VR treatment designed for children with autism

fastDevelopment.title: Personalized Learning
fastDevelopment.description: AI-powered adaptive scenarios that adjust to each child's unique needs, learning pace, and therapeutic goals.

scalable.title: Gamified Experience
scalable.description: Interactive VR games that make therapy engaging and enjoyable, encouraging active participation and better learning outcomes.

modern.title: Safe & Supervised
modern.description: Controlled virtual environments with therapist oversight and progress tracking for complete safety.

footer.description: Enabling immersive and data driven autism treatment.

featuresPage.title: Product Features
featuresPage.subtitle: Discover the innovative features that power our immersive gaming experience

personalizedLearningPrograms.title: Personalized Learning Programs
personalizedLearningPrograms.description: Each VR experience is customized to the child's specific needs, learning style, and therapeutic goals. Our adaptive AI algorithms continuously adjust difficulty and engagement levels based on real-time performance.

aiPoweredNPCs.title: Gamified & Interactive
aiPoweredNPCs.description: Our immersive VR games make therapy sessions more engaging and enjoyable, leading to better outcomes and increased participation. Children learn through play in safe, controlled environments.

dynamicEnvironments.title: Safe & Supervised Environment
dynamicEnvironments.description: All experiences are designed in safe, controlled virtual environments with professional oversight, comprehensive progress tracking, and parental monitoring capabilities.
